reason: Strong institutional buying, exemplified by Strategy's significant Bitcoin purchase, indicates an underlying accumulation phase and long-term conviction from major players. Furthermore, talks regarding a euro-pegged stablecoin suggest growing institutional integration and liquidity. However, this bullish sentiment is severely challenged by immediate geopolitical instability, as evidenced by large crypto outflows from Iran, and increasing regulatory pressure, such as Turkey's proposed crypto income tax. These external shocks introduce significant short-term volatility and downside risk, creating a highly contested market environment that warrants a cautious 'WATCH' approach.
headlines: EU banks’ euro-pegged stablecoin in talks with crypto exchanges to ensure liquidity
CoinDesk 20 performance update: NEAR Protocol (NEAR) jumps 12.4% over weekend
Iranian crypto outflows jump 700% minutes after U.S.-Israeli airstrikes, Elliptic says
Turkey's ruling party unveils 10% crypto income tax proposal
Strategy purchased more than $200 million in bitcoin last week
